description_long: This is a classic-style red scooter with a streamlined, retro design reminiscent of vintage Vespa models. The body is predominantly a vibrant red with a smooth, glossy finish, and it features a wide, cushioned brown seat suitable for one or two riders. The scooter has two large, spoked wheels with whitewall tires, a prominent front fender, and a rear engine cover that blends seamlessly into the bodywork. The handlebars are straight with black grips and rearview mirrors, and the front includes a circular headlight and a small windscreen. The kickstand is visible beneath the deck, and the rear section houses a red taillight and a vented panel for engine cooling. Subtle chrome accents and a visible brand logo on the front add to its urban appeal.
description: A vintage-style red scooter with a brown cushioned seat, chrome accents, and a classic rounded body, featuring a front headlight and whitewall tires.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the red scooter, brown seat, kickstand, and rear engine cover.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the brown seat, red taillight, and the width of the rear bodywork.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with visible vented engine panel and footrest.
description_view_3: Front view showing the circular headlight, handlebar, front fender, and visible brand logo on the front panel.
attribute_deck_design: elongated, wide, smooth deck with a black footrest area and integrated kickstand
attribute_brand_logo: Visible script-style logo on the front panel
